ns0:entry.ns0:title: Dolibarr/dolibarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Dolibarr/dolibarr
Language: php
Dolibarr ERP CRM is a modern software package to manage your company or foundation's activity (contacts, suppliers, invoices, orders, stocks, agenda, accounting, ...). it's an open source Web application (written in PHP) designed for businesses of any sizes, foundations and freelancers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HiEventsDev/Hi.Events
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HiEventsDev/Hi.Events
Language: php
Open-source event management and ticket selling platform — perfect for concerts, conferences, and everything in between 🎟️ If you find this project helpful, please consider giving us a star ⭐️

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Leantime/leantime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Leantime/leantime
Language: php
Leantime is a goals focused project management system for non-project managers. Building with ADHD, Autism, and dyslexia in mind.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PHPOffice/PhpSpreadsheet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PHPOffice/PhpSpreadsheet
Language: php
A pure PHP library for reading and writing spreadsheet files

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/mcp-adapter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/mcp-adapter
Language: php
An MCP adapter that bridges the Abilities API to the Model Context Protocol, enabling MCP clients to discover and invoke WordPress plugin, theme, and core abilities programmatically.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aureuserp/aureuserp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aureuserp/aureuserp
Language: php
Free and Open Source ERP platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bagisto/bagisto
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bagisto/bagisto
Language: php
Free and open source laravel eCommerce platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cedar2025/Xboard
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cedar2025/Xboard
Language: php
High-performance panel based on V2board secondary development supporting new protocols and new features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: firefly-iii/firefly-iii
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firefly-iii/firefly-iii
Language: php
Firefly III: a personal finances manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: glpi-project/glpi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi
Language: php
GLPI is a Free Asset and IT Management Software package, Data center management, ITIL Service Desk, licenses tracking and software auditing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: invoiceninja/invoiceninja
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/invoiceninja/invoiceninja
Language: php
A source-available invoice, quote, project and time-tracking app built with Laravel

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kimai/kimai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kimai/kimai
Language: php
Kimai is the #1 open-source time-tracking application. From freelancers to companies and organisations - everyone can manage timesheets, generate reports, create invoices and so much more... Web-based multi-user application, available as On-Premise or SaaS version: https://www.kimai.org

ns0:entry.ns0:title: matomo-org/matomo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/matomo-org/matomo
Language: php
Empowering People Ethically 🚀 — Matomo is hiring! Join us → https://matomo.org/jobs Matomo is the leading open-source alternative to Google Analytics, giving you complete control and built-in privacy. Easily collect, visualise, and analyse data from websites & apps. Star us on GitHub ⭐️ – Pull Requests welcome!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mautic/mautic
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mautic/mautic
Language: php
Mautic: Open Source Marketing Automation Software.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openemr/openemr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openemr/openemr
Language: php
The most popular open source electronic health records and medical practice management solution.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openmediavault/openmediavault
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openmediavault/openmediavault
Language: php
openmediavault is the next generation network attached storage (NAS) solution based on Debian Linux. Thanks to the modular design of the framework it can be enhanced via plugins. openmediavault is primarily designed to be used in home environments or small home offices.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unopim/unopim
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unopim/unopim
Language: php
Unopim is a free and open-source Laravel-based Product Information Management (PIM) system that helps businesses manage and enrich product data from a single platform. Built to scale beyond 10M+ products, now evolving with Agentic PIM capabilities.
